name: woocommerce-product-embedding
description: Sync WooCommerce products to Cloudflare Vectorize for semantic search

scripts.setup:queues: npx wrangler queues create woocommerce-product-sync && npx wrangler queues create woocommerce-product-sync-dlq

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for generating text-embedding-3-small vectors. Get one at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

WOOCOMMERCE_KEY.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer key (ck_...). Generate at WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API with Read permissions.

WOOCOMMERCE_SECRET.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer secret (cs_...). Generated alongside the consumer key.

WOOCOMMERCE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for verifying WooCommerce webhooks. Must match the secret in WooCommerce Admin > Webhooks.
